title.zh: 无害 AutoType 策略检查

execution.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/fastjson/parse" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: fastjson-policy-001" --data '{"@type":"java.util.HashMap","marker":"FASTJSON_POLICY_CANARY_A1"}' | jq -e '.marker == "FASTJSON_POLICY_CANARY_A1" and .external_lookup == false'

description.zh: 向无网络出口的本地解析器提交 HashMap 类型标记，并断言合成 marker 保留且 external_lookup=false。
description.en: Submit a HashMap type marker to the no-egress local parser and assert that the synthetic marker remains while external_lookup is false.

targetName.zh: Java 框架依赖版本审计

targetDescription.zh: 从本地实验 JAR Manifest 读取 Fastjson、Log4j 等 Java 框架的实际标题和版本，并与供应商安全公告映射。
targetDescription.en: Reads actual titles and versions for Fastjson, Log4j, and related Java framework JARs from local lab manifests and maps them to vendor security advisories.

navName.zh: Java 框架依赖版本审计

description.zh: 只读取 fixtures 中 Fastjson JAR 的 Manifest 标题与版本，避免加载类或运行反序列化。
description.en: Read only title and version fields from the Fastjson JAR manifest in fixtures without loading classes or running deserialization.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE fastjson-rce JdbcRowSet JNDI gadget payload

reason.zh: 原块实例化 JdbcRowSet 并指向外部 LDAP，属于 JNDI gadget 与远程查找链，不能保留。
reason.en: The original block instantiated JdbcRowSet and pointed it to external LDAP, forming a JNDI gadget and remote-lookup chain, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE fastjson-rce AutoType class-loading bypass chain

reason.zh: 原块利用类对象与 JdbcRowSet 绕过 AutoType 并触发远程引用，不属于无害策略验证。
reason.en: The original block combined class objects with JdbcRowSet to bypass AutoType and trigger a remote reference, outside harmless policy validation.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE fastjson-rce encoded and nested JNDI gadget variants

reason.zh: 原块用编码与嵌套形式隐藏同一 JNDI gadget，目标是规避过滤并产生外连，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block hid the same JNDI gadget through encoding and nesting to evade filters and cause egress, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE fastjson-rce BCEL and version-specific gadget chains

reason.zh: 原块列出 BCEL、AutoType 和 expectClass 历史 gadget 链，含不完整字节码与远程引用，整体退休。
reason.en: The original block listed BCEL, AutoType, and expectClass gadget chains with incomplete bytecode and remote references, so it is retired.

title.zh: JMX Console 匿名访问检查

description.zh: 无凭据请求 localhost JMX Console，并只接受 401、403 或 404 作为安全访问基线。
description.en: Request the localhost JMX Console without credentials and accept only 401, 403, or 404 as the secure access baseline.

targetName.zh: JBoss 与 WildFly 管理面诊断

targetDescription.zh: 使用 localhost OPTIONS、固定端点状态矩阵和容器内只读 CLI 检查 JBoss 或 WildFly 管理应用、Invoker 与版本配置。
targetDescription.en: Uses localhost OPTIONS, a fixed endpoint-status matrix, and read-only in-container CLI commands to inspect JBoss or WildFly management applications, Invokers, and version configuration.

description.zh: 向本地 JMXInvokerServlet 发送只读 OPTIONS，保存状态、Allow 与认证 Header，不提交序列化数据。
description.en: Send read-only OPTIONS to the local JMXInvokerServlet and preserve status, Allow, and authentication headers without serialized data.

description.zh: 在 jboss-lab 容器内通过 CLI 读取版本和 management 核心资源，不执行部署或写操作。
description.en: Read version and management core resources through CLI inside jboss-lab without deployment or write operations.

commands.command: for path in invoker/JMXInvokerServlet invoker/EJBInvokerServlet jmx-console web-console; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$path %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/$path" -H "X-Request-ID: jboss-surface-001"; done

description.zh: 仅检查四个登记过的旧管理路径状态，定位暴露面而不扩展路径枚举。
description.en: Check status for four preregistered legacy management paths to identify exposure without expanding route enumeration.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE jboss-vuln BeanShell process-execution deployment script

reason.zh: 原块通过 BSHDeployer 执行 BeanShell 和系统命令并复制输出，具有直接进程副作用，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block used BSHDeployer to run BeanShell and operating-system commands and copy output, creating direct process side effects, so it is retired.

title.zh: 本地消息 Lookup 策略检查

execution.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/log4j/log" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: log4j-lookup-001" --data '{"message":"LOOKUP_CANARY_${java:version}"}' | jq -e '.request_id and .network_lookup == false and .logged_value'

description.zh: 记录不含 JNDI 的 Java 版本 Lookup 形状，并断言本地 Fixture 没有产生网络查找。
description.en: Log a Java-version lookup shape without JNDI and assert that the local fixture produced no network lookup.

targetName.zh: Java 框架依赖版本审计

targetDescription.zh: 从本地实验 JAR Manifest 读取 Fastjson、Log4j 等 Java 框架的实际标题和版本，并与供应商安全公告映射。
targetDescription.en: Reads actual titles and versions for Fastjson, Log4j, and related Java framework JARs from local lab manifests and maps them to vendor security advisories.

navName.zh: Java 框架依赖版本审计

description.zh: 读取本地 log4j-core JAR 的 Manifest 与 Bundle 版本，和 Apache 安全公告比对。
description.en: Read manifest and bundle versions from the local log4j-core JAR and compare them with Apache security advisories.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE log4j-rce environment and system-property DNS exfiltration lookups

reason.zh: 原块把环境变量和系统属性拼入 DNS 名称外带，涉及真实信息泄露和外连，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block embedded environment and system properties in DNS names for exfiltration, causing real disclosure and egress, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE log4j-rce reverse-shell JNDI lookup

reason.zh: 原块的 JNDI 地址编码反向 Shell，形成可直接部署的命令执行链，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block encoded a reverse shell in a JNDI address, forming a directly deployable command-execution chain, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE log4j-rce lower-upper and character-fragment filter-evasion lookups

reason.zh: 原块通过大小写和字符片段重组 jndi 名称规避关键字过滤，目标是绕过检测，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block reconstructed the jndi name through case conversion and character fragments to evade keyword filters, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE log4j-rce protocol and nested-lookup filter-evasion variants

reason.zh: 原块通过嵌套协议与 DNS 变体规避字符过滤并产生外连，不符合无网络边界。
reason.en: The original block used nested protocol and DNS variants to evade character filters and create egress, violating the no-network boundary.

targetName.zh: Apache Shiro rememberMe 安全诊断

targetDescription.zh: 使用 localhost 无效 Cookie 响应和受控运行配置文件检查 Shiro 版本、密码模式、密钥来源与序列化过滤，而不生成 gadget。
targetDescription.en: Uses localhost invalid-cookie responses and controlled runtime configuration to inspect Shiro version, cipher mode, key source, and serialization filtering without generating gadgets.

name.zh: 无效 rememberMe Cookie 对照

description.zh: 发送一个固定不可解密 Cookie 并只记录状态和 Set-Cookie，用于识别拒绝路径而非默认密钥。
description.en: Send one fixed undecryptable cookie and retain status plus Set-Cookie to identify the rejection path rather than a default key.

description.zh: 从受控属性文件读取版本、密码模式、密钥来源和序列化过滤器，不输出密钥值。
description.en: Read version, cipher mode, key source, and serialization filter from a controlled property file without outputting key values.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE shiro-deserialize ysoserial gadget encryption and default-key workflow

reason.zh: 原块生成 ysoserial gadget、使用公开默认密钥并执行命令，属于完整反序列化利用链，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block generated a ysoserial gadget, used a public default key, and executed commands, forming a complete deserialization exploit chain, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE shiro-deserialize exploit-tool and encoded-gadget delivery workflow

reason.zh: 原块调用多个 Shiro 利用器发送加密 gadget 与命令，不符合无副作用诊断边界。
reason.en: The original block invoked multiple Shiro exploit tools to send encrypted gadgets and commands, outside side-effect-free diagnostics.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE shiro-deserialize gadget-chain selection list

reason.zh: 原块列出 CommonsCollections、Beanutils、Jdk7u21 与 JRMPClient gadget 选择，整体退休。
reason.en: The original block listed CommonsCollections, Beanutils, Jdk7u21, and JRMPClient gadget choices, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE shiro-deserialize rememberMe key brute-force workflow

reason.zh: 原块通过 keys.txt 和扫描工具爆破 rememberMe 密钥，属于凭据猜测与自动化利用，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block brute-forced rememberMe keys through keys.txt and scanners, combining credential guessing with automated exploitation, so it is retired.

targetName.zh: Spring 管理端点与版本诊断
targetName.en: Spring Management Endpoint and Version Diagnostics

targetDescription.zh: 对 localhost Spring Boot 与 Spring Cloud Fixture 执行固定 Actuator 状态矩阵、授权链接读取和本地 JAR 版本检查。
targetDescription.en: Runs a fixed Actuator status matrix, authorized root-link inspection, and local JAR version checks for localhost Spring Boot and Spring Cloud fixtures.

navName.zh: Spring 管理端点与版本诊断

commands.command: for path in actuator actuator/health actuator/env actuator/mappings; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$path %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/$path" -H "X-Request-ID: actuator-surface-001"; done

description.zh: 仅检查 actuator、health、env 与 mappings 四个登记路径的状态，不读取敏感正文。
description.en: Check status only for the four registered actuator, health, env, and mappings paths without reading sensitive bodies.

name.zh: 审核者 Actuator 链接清单

commands.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/actuator" -H "Authorization: Bearer actuator-reviewer-token" -H "X-Request-ID: actuator-links-001" | jq -e '._links | keys'

description.zh: 由固定审核者读取 Actuator 根链接键名，确认暴露配置而不读取端点数据值。
description.en: Have a fixed reviewer read Actuator root link keys to verify exposure configuration without endpoint data values.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE spring-actuator heap-dump download and secret-search workflow

reason.zh: 原块下载 heapdump 并搜索密码和秘密，涉及敏感内存数据收集，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block downloaded a heap dump and searched for passwords and secrets, collecting sensitive memory data, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE spring-actuator environment mutation and restart command-execution chain

reason.zh: 原块通过 env 写入数据库测试查询并 restart 触发命令执行，具有配置修改与进程副作用。
reason.en: The original block wrote a database test query through env and triggered restart for command execution, causing configuration and process side effects.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE spring-actuator traversal semicolon and multi-encoding endpoint bypasses

reason.zh: 原块使用分号、遍历和多重编码规避端点访问控制，还包含 heapdump 路径，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block used semicolons, traversal, and multiple encodings to evade endpoint access controls and included heapdump paths, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE spring-actuator method-override external-bootstrap and case-bypass variants

reason.zh: 原块使用方法覆盖、外部 bootstrap 配置和大小写变体绕过策略，涉及外连与配置注入。
reason.en: The original block used method override, external bootstrap configuration, and case variants to bypass policy, including egress and configuration injection.

title.zh: Gateway routes 低权限访问检查

execution.command: code=$(curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "http://127.0.0.1:18080/actuator/gateway/routes" -H "Authorization: Bearer spring-user-token" -H "X-Request-ID: spring-cloud-gateway-001"); printf '%s\n' "$code"; test "$code" = 401 -o "$code" = 403 -o "$code" = 404

description.zh: 以低权限实验令牌只读请求 routes 管理端点，并断言返回 401、403 或 404。
description.en: Request the routes management endpoint read-only with a low-privilege lab token and assert 401, 403, or 404.

targetName.zh: Spring 管理端点与版本诊断
targetName.en: Spring Management Endpoint and Version Diagnostics

targetDescription.zh: 对 localhost Spring Boot 与 Spring Cloud Fixture 执行固定 Actuator 状态矩阵、授权链接读取和本地 JAR 版本检查。
targetDescription.en: Runs a fixed Actuator status matrix, authorized root-link inspection, and local JAR version checks for localhost Spring Boot and Spring Cloud fixtures.

navName.zh: Spring 管理端点与版本诊断

name.zh: Spring Cloud Gateway JAR 版本

description.zh: 从本地 Gateway JAR Manifest 读取标题、版本和 Spring Boot 版本，不启动应用。
description.en: Read title, version, and Spring Boot version from the local Gateway JAR manifest without starting the application.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE spring-cloud directory-traversal and Eureka SSRF workflow

reason.zh: 原块混合多重编码文件读取与 Eureka 内网 SSRF，涉及真实文件和网络边界突破，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block mixed multi-encoded file reading with Eureka internal SSRF, crossing real file and network boundaries, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE spring-cloud single and double URL-encoding traversal bypasses

reason.zh: 原块只描述单次与双重 URL 编码遍历规避，没有安全检测边界，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block described single- and double-encoded traversal evasion without a safe detection boundary, so it is retired.

execution.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/spel/evaluate" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: spel-simple-001" --data '{"expression":"7 * 7","mode":"simple"}' | jq -e '.result == 49 and .type_access == false and .method_invocation == false'

description.zh: 在本地 simple 模式计算固定算术，并断言类型访问与方法调用能力均关闭。
description.en: Evaluate fixed arithmetic in local simple mode and assert that type access and method invocation capabilities are both disabled.

targetName.zh: Spring Framework 表达式安全诊断

targetDescription.zh: 从本地策略文件核对 Spring 表达式上下文、类型访问、方法调用、Bean 解析和自动增长能力，配合安全算术回归。
targetDescription.en: Reviews local Spring expression policy for context type, type access, method invocation, bean resolution, and auto-grow capabilities alongside safe arithmetic regression.

description.zh: 读取本地表达式策略中的上下文、类型、方法、Bean 和 autoGrow 设置，不执行表达式。
description.en: Read context, type, method, bean, and autoGrow settings from the local expression policy without evaluating an expression.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE spring-spel Runtime ProcessBuilder and reverse-shell expressions

reason.zh: 原块包含 Runtime、ProcessBuilder、Windows 命令和反向 Shell，均会启动真实进程，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block contained Runtime, ProcessBuilder, Windows commands, and a reverse shell, all starting real processes, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE spring-spel process-based and direct file-read expressions

reason.zh: 原块通过进程和 Files API 读取 /etc/passwd，涉及真实文件内容，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block read /etc/passwd through processes and the Files API, accessing real file content, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE spring-spel DNS lookup and file-content exfiltration expressions

reason.zh: 原块触发 DNS 并把文件字节拼入域名外带，违反无外连和无真实数据要求。
reason.en: The original block triggered DNS and embedded file bytes in a domain for exfiltration, violating no-egress and synthetic-data requirements.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE spring-spel reflection and ScriptEngine filter-evasion expressions

reason.zh: 原块通过反射和 ScriptEngine 规避过滤并执行命令，属于能力绕过链，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block used reflection and ScriptEngine to evade filtering and execute commands, forming a capability-bypass chain, so it is retired.

execution.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/struts-lab/evaluate" -H "X-Request-ID: struts-ognl-simple-001" --data-urlencode 'value=%{7*7}' | jq -e '.result == 49 and .static_method_access == false and .process_start == false'

description.zh: 向本地受限求值器提交固定算术，断言结果为 49 且静态方法和进程启动能力关闭。
description.en: Submit fixed arithmetic to the restricted local evaluator and assert result 49 with static-method and process-start capabilities disabled.

targetName.zh: Apache Struts2 版本与表达式诊断
targetName.en: Apache Struts2 Version and Expression Diagnostics

targetDescription.zh: 读取本地 Struts2 版本与 OGNL 成员策略，并用无害上传 Header 和规范 Action 路径检查历史表达式入口。
targetDescription.en: Reads local Struts2 version and OGNL member policy and checks historical expression entry points with a harmless upload header and canonical Action path.

navName.zh: Struts2 版本与表达式诊断

description.zh: 读取本地版本、静态方法开关、排除类和排除包设置，不求值任何危险表达式。
description.en: Read local version, static-method switch, excluded classes, and excluded packages without evaluating dangerous expressions.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE struts2-ognl Runtime ProcessBuilder and response-copy command chain

reason.zh: 原块使用 Runtime、ProcessBuilder 和响应流复制执行并回显系统命令，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block used Runtime, ProcessBuilder, and response-stream copying to execute and return operating-system commands, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE struts2-ognl file-read webshell-write and directory-list expressions

reason.zh: 原块读取 /etc/passwd、写入 JSP WebShell 并列出根目录，具有文件系统破坏与泄露。
reason.en: The original block read /etc/passwd, wrote a JSP webshell, and listed the root directory, causing filesystem disclosure and modification.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE struts2-ognl Unicode hexadecimal and concatenation evasion variants

reason.zh: 原块以 Unicode、十六进制和字符串拼接规避关键字检测，没有安全求值目的。
reason.en: The original block used Unicode, hexadecimal, and concatenation to evade keyword detection without a safe evaluation purpose.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE struts2-ognl reflective Runtime invocation chain

reason.zh: 原块通过反射获取 Runtime 并调用 exec，构成直接命令执行链，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block obtained Runtime through reflection and invoked exec, forming a direct command-execution chain, so it is retired.

targetName.zh: Apache Struts2 版本与表达式诊断
targetName.en: Apache Struts2 Version and Expression Diagnostics

targetDescription.zh: 读取本地 Struts2 版本与 OGNL 成员策略，并用无害上传 Header 和规范 Action 路径检查历史表达式入口。
targetDescription.en: Reads local Struts2 version and OGNL member policy and checks historical expression entry points with a harmless upload header and canonical Action path.

navName.zh: Struts2 版本与表达式诊断

description.zh: 读取本地 struts2-core JAR 的 Manifest 与 Bundle 版本并映射 Apache 公告。
description.en: Read manifest and bundle versions from the local struts2-core JAR and map them to Apache advisories.

name.zh: 无害上传 Header 检查

commands.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/struts-lab/upload" -H 'Content-Disposition: form-data; name="upload"; filename="%{7*7}"' -H "X-Request-ID: struts-upload-header-001" -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\n'

description.zh: 发送只含算术文件名的 Content-Disposition Header 并记录状态，不上传文件或调用方法。
description.en: Send a Content-Disposition header containing an arithmetic filename and record status without uploading a file or invoking methods.

name.zh: 规范 Action 路径基线

description.zh: 请求一个普通 localhost test.action，建立路由状态基线而不在 Namespace 中放表达式。
description.en: Request one ordinary localhost test.action to establish routing status without placing an expression in the namespace.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE struts2-rce encoded form-body Runtime execution expression

reason.zh: 原块提交编码 OGNL 并调用 Runtime.exec，属于直接表单命令执行，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block submitted encoded OGNL and invoked Runtime.exec, forming direct form-based command execution, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE struts2-rce URL Unicode and double-encoding filter-evasion forms

reason.zh: 原块列出 URL、Unicode 和双重编码以规避表达式过滤，目标是绕过检测。
reason.en: The original block listed URL, Unicode, and double encodings to evade expression filtering, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE struts2-rce expression-syntax and static-method execution variants

reason.zh: 原块列出多种表达式语法、Runtime 和 ProcessBuilder 静态能力，属于执行变体。
reason.en: The original block listed multiple expression syntaxes plus Runtime and ProcessBuilder capabilities, forming execution variants.

title.zh: Tomcat Manager 匿名访问检查

description.zh: 无凭据请求本地 Manager 根页面，并断言 401、403 或 404，不尝试任何账户。
description.en: Request the local Manager root without credentials and assert 401, 403, or 404 without trying any account.

targetName.zh: Apache Tomcat 连接器与方法诊断
targetName.en: Apache Tomcat Connector and Method Diagnostics

targetDescription.zh: 在 tomcat-lab 容器内只读检查 AJP 监听、secretRequired 与 secret 配置，并通过 localhost OPTIONS 核对静态资源方法策略。
targetDescription.en: Reads AJP listener, secretRequired, and secret configuration inside tomcat-lab and checks static-resource method policy through localhost OPTIONS.

navName.zh: Tomcat 连接器与方法诊断

description.zh: 在容器内只读 server.xml 的 AJP 协议、地址和 secret 设置，不连接 AJP 或读取应用文件。
description.en: Read AJP protocol, address, and secret settings from server.xml inside the container without connecting to AJP or reading application files.

description.zh: 向合成静态目录发送 OPTIONS 并保存状态与 Allow，确认写方法未暴露。
description.en: Send OPTIONS to a synthetic static directory and retain status plus Allow to confirm write methods are not exposed.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE tomcat-vuln WAR webshell packaging deployment and command access

reason.zh: 原块构造 JSP WebShell、打包 WAR、使用弱凭据部署并执行命令，属于完整持久化链。
reason.en: The original block created a JSP webshell, packaged a WAR, deployed with weak credentials, and executed commands, forming a persistent exploit chain.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE tomcat-vuln JSP filename stream suffix null-byte and case bypasses

reason.zh: 原块列出 JSP 空格、ADS、斜杠、空字节和大小写文件名规避，目标是绕过写入限制。
reason.en: The original block listed JSP space, ADS, slash, null-byte, and case filename evasions to bypass write restrictions, so it is retired.

targetName.zh: WebLogic T3 与 IIOP 协议诊断
targetName.en: WebLogic T3 and IIOP Protocol Diagnostics

targetDescription.zh: 使用 localhost 单端口轻量识别、最小 T3 握手和容器内配置读取验证 WebLogic 协议监听面，不发送序列化对象。
targetDescription.en: Validates WebLogic protocol listeners through localhost single-port identification, a minimal T3 handshake, and in-container configuration reads without serialized objects.

description.zh: 仅对 127.0.0.1:17001 运行 version-light 服务识别，记录监听面而不发送对象载荷。
description.en: Run version-light service identification only against 127.0.0.1:17001 and record listener surface without object payloads.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-iiop CVE exploit repository JRMP listener and reverse-shell gadget

reason.zh: 原块克隆 CVE 利用器、编译执行并启动带反向 Shell gadget 的 JRMP Listener，整体退休。
reason.en: The original block cloned and ran a CVE exploit and started a JRMP listener with a reverse-shell gadget, so it is retired.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-iiop JNDI reference construction and exploit-service workflow

reason.zh: 原块构造外部 IIOP JNDI 引用并启动 JNDIExploit，包含远程对象与外连。
reason.en: The original block constructed an external IIOP JNDI reference and launched JNDIExploit, involving remote objects and egress.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-iiop T3-IIOP protocol switching to evade inspection

reason.zh: 原块建议在 T3 与 IIOP 间切换以规避检测，明确属于协议层绕过。
reason.en: The original block recommended switching between T3 and IIOP to evade detection, an explicit protocol-layer bypass.

targetName.zh: WebLogic 管理与 WorkContext 诊断

targetDescription.zh: 使用规范 Console HEAD、固定管理端点状态和只读 OPTIONS 验证 localhost WebLogic 管理面与 WSAT 暴露策略。
targetDescription.en: Uses canonical Console HEAD, fixed management-endpoint status, and read-only OPTIONS to validate localhost WebLogic management and WSAT exposure policy.

navName.zh: WebLogic 管理与 WSAT 诊断

name.zh: 规范 Console 登录 HEAD

description.zh: 只请求规范 Console 登录 URL 并保留状态、Location 与认证 Header，不使用编码路径。
description.en: Request only the canonical Console login URL and retain status, Location, and authentication headers without encoded paths.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-rce XMLDecoder ProcessBuilder SOAP execution body

reason.zh: 原块在 WSAT WorkContext 中使用 ProcessBuilder 执行 /bin/bash，属于直接 XMLDecoder RCE。
reason.en: The original block used ProcessBuilder in a WSAT WorkContext to execute /bin/bash, constituting direct XMLDecoder RCE.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-rce asynchronous XMLDecoder ProcessBuilder execution body

reason.zh: 原块在异步服务中使用 XMLDecoder 与 ProcessBuilder 执行命令，同样具有进程副作用。
reason.en: The original block used XMLDecoder and ProcessBuilder in an asynchronous service to execute commands, also causing process side effects.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-rce encoded console traversal and login-policy bypass paths

reason.zh: 原块列出多种编码 Console 遍历路径以绕过登录策略，明确属于访问控制规避。
reason.en: The original block listed encoded Console traversal paths to bypass login policy, an explicit access-control evasion.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-rce XML Runtime exec and command-array variants

reason.zh: 原块用 XML Runtime、exec 和命令数组变体执行系统命令，因此退休。
reason.en: The original block used XML Runtime, exec, and command-array variants to execute operating-system commands, so it is retired.

targetName.zh: WebLogic T3 与 IIOP 协议诊断
targetName.en: WebLogic T3 and IIOP Protocol Diagnostics

targetDescription.zh: 使用 localhost 单端口轻量识别、最小 T3 握手和容器内配置读取验证 WebLogic 协议监听面，不发送序列化对象。
targetDescription.en: Validates WebLogic protocol listeners through localhost single-port identification, a minimal T3 handshake, and in-container configuration reads without serialized objects.

description.zh: 向 localhost 单端口发送公开握手头并只读取首行，不追加序列化对象。
description.en: Send the public handshake header to one localhost port and read the first line only without serialized objects.

description.zh: 在 weblogic-lab 容器内只读监听端口、地址、默认协议和 IIOPEnabled 设置。
description.en: Read listen port, address, default protocol, and IIOPEnabled settings inside weblogic-lab without changing the domain.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-t3 exploit scanners command execution and JRMP gadget workflow

reason.zh: 原块调用 WebLogic 利用器、命令执行工具和 ysoserial JRMP gadget，形成完整利用工作流。
reason.en: The original block invoked WebLogic exploit tools, command execution, and ysoserial JRMP gadgets, forming a complete exploit workflow.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-t3 gadget-chain selection list

reason.zh: 原块列出七种反序列化 gadget 链并要求按目标选择，属于可利用链选择指南。
reason.en: The original block listed seven deserialization gadget chains and advised target-specific selection, making it an exploit-chain guide.

title.zh: 无害 WorkContext marker 请求

description.zh: 向本地 WSAT 端点发送只含自定义 marker 的 SOAP，并记录拒绝状态，不包含 Java 对象标签。
description.en: Send SOAP containing only a custom marker to the local WSAT endpoint and record rejection status without Java-object tags.

targetName.zh: WebLogic 管理与 WorkContext 诊断

targetDescription.zh: 使用规范 Console HEAD、固定管理端点状态和只读 OPTIONS 验证 localhost WebLogic 管理面与 WSAT 暴露策略。
targetDescription.en: Uses canonical Console HEAD, fixed management-endpoint status, and read-only OPTIONS to validate localhost WebLogic management and WSAT exposure policy.

navName.zh: WebLogic 管理与 WSAT 诊断

name.zh: 固定管理端点状态矩阵

commands.command: for path in console/ wls-wsat/CoordinatorPortType _async/AsyncResponseService; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$path %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/$path" -H "X-Request-ID: weblogic-surface-001"; done

description.zh: 只检查 Console、CoordinatorPortType 与 AsyncResponseService 三个本地路径状态。
description.en: Check status only for the three local Console, CoordinatorPortType, and AsyncResponseService paths.

name.zh: 固定 WSAT OPTIONS 矩阵

commands.command: for path in wls-wsat/CoordinatorPortType wls-wsat/CoordinatorPortType11 wls-wsat/ParticipantPortType; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X OPTIONS "http://127.0.0.1:18080/$path" -H "X-Request-ID: weblogic-endpoint-001" -o /dev/null -w "$path %{http_code}\n"; done

description.zh: 对三个登记 WSAT 路径发送只读 OPTIONS，记录状态而不提交 XML 文件。
description.en: Send read-only OPTIONS to three registered WSAT paths and record status without submitting an XML file.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-xmldecoder asynchronous ProcessBuilder callback body

reason.zh: 原块通过 AsyncResponseService 的 ProcessBuilder 执行 curl 外部回连，涉及命令和外带。
reason.en: The original block used ProcessBuilder through AsyncResponseService to execute an external curl callback, involving commands and egress.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-xmldecoder persistent JSP webshell write and invocation workflow

reason.zh: 原块用 XMLDecoder 写入持久 JSP WebShell 并执行请求参数命令，具有文件写入和持久化。
reason.en: The original block used XMLDecoder to write a persistent JSP webshell and execute request parameters, causing file writes and persistence.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-xmldecoder T3-IIOP exploit and serialized gadget delivery workflow

reason.zh: 原块通过 T3、IIOP 和 ysoserial 规避 HTTP 层并发送命令 gadget，属于协议绕过。
reason.en: The original block used T3, IIOP, and ysoserial to evade the HTTP layer and send command gadgets, constituting protocol bypass.

retiredCommands.command: RETIRE weblogic-xmldecoder UTF-16 CDATA and ProcessBuilder XML evasion body

reason.zh: 原块用 UTF-16、CDATA 和 ProcessBuilder 混淆 XML 命令体，目标是规避检测并执行 id。
reason.en: The original block obfuscated an XML command body with UTF-16, CDATA, and ProcessBuilder to evade detection and execute id.
